title: September 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 19''' is the 262nd day of the year (263rd in leap years). There are 103 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Victor Brandt]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 82|''Star Wars Weekly'' 82]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[River of Chaos 3|''River of Chaos'' 3]] published.
*1995 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 2]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 6|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 6]] published.
*2001 – [[Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope 3|''Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope'' 3]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' published.
*2007 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 20|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 20]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Bernard Behrens]] dies.
*2012 – [[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 5|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 5]] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars]] Part 1'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.51]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Lando - Double or Nothing 5|''Lando - Double or Nothing'' 5]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars (2015) 54|''Star Wars'' (2015) 54]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunters Vol. 6 — Bedlam on Bestine]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures – The Nameless Terror (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures - The Nameless Terror'' trade paperback]] published.
*2023 – "[[Part Six: Far, Far Away]]" airs on Disney+.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Padawan's Pride]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy - Pieces of the Past]]'' premiered on Disney+.
<noinclude>
